strategy_decisions.rationale: Zero trades on valid data is a hard red flag. This broader reclaim framing still failed the minimum participation test, so it should be killed rather than cosmetically retuned.
The strategy produced zero trades despite persistence-focused compression logic. That means the structure remains too sparse for the active lane and does not deserve refinement.
Reclaim-and-hold continuation also returned zero trades on valid data. With no evidence of density or edge, the only honest action is abort.
